flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southeastern College-West Palm Beach rose 50% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.7k → $19.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southeastern College-West Palm Beach fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (682 → 563).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southeastern College-West Palm Beach rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.3k → $24.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southeastern College-West Palm Beach rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.3k → $24.5k).
